Weight Converter

Convert between all common weight units: kilograms, pounds, ounces, stones, grams, metric tons.

FAQ

How many pounds in a kilogram?

1 kilogram = 2.20462 pounds. To convert kg to lbs, multiply by 2.20462.

How many kg in a stone?

1 stone = 6.35029 kilograms. Stones are commonly used in the UK for body weight.
